Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER and the end of the case

Name: Total time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Total time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in variants containing rejections by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER and the next activity, grouped by whether the next activity is Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER or Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER in cases that eventually lead to Payment Handled
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER in cases that result in Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER compared to time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER to Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER in variants that include a rejection by PRE_APPROVER versus those that do not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER to be followed by any subsequent activity in domestic declaration cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER in cases submitted within two months after the trip versus cases submitted immediately after cost payment
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER and the end of the case

Name: Total time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER to Request Payment in successful variants involving PRE_APPROVER approval
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Time of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER when preceded by Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE without intermediate rejections versus when preceded by one or more rejections
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER and the end of the case

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER in variants where the budget owner and supervisor are the same person versus when they are different
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER and the end of the case
